title: aquarius major
intro: Aquarius major, also known as the African tea tree or Buchu, is a small, evergreen shrub native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant's leaves have been traditionally used in medicine due to their high concentration of essential oils, particularly diosphenol, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Aquarius major include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used to promote urinary health and reduce symptoms of kidney stones.
